title: From prompt to a fully working real-time voice app in seconds. 🎙️✨
summary: Google AI Studio enables developers to build, deploy, and remix real-time AI voice applications from a single voice prompt. The tool transforms development from static code to dynamic agentic workflows, reducing deployment time significantly.
